title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'framework_development' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'framework_development' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load framework_development's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform framework_development's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Harness/spoke/local/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/framework_development/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'framework_development'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
completion_notes: Completed: Scanned framework_development feeds (teachings, specs, implementation lugs, CLAUDE.md rules). Identified 3 new findings: (1) 4 high-urgency blocked lugs impacting expedition, (2) 10 advisors with unresolved {FEEDS_CONTEXT} placeholders breaking context synthesis, (3) 33 open lugs with blocking dependencies creating bottleneck network. Created 3 actionable haiku task lugs (unblock tier1, feeds-system impl, dependency audit). Updated scan_state.json and schedule-index.json with last_run_at=2026-06-27T02:39:05.705559Z. Findings appended to findings-log.jsonl (9 total, 8 actionable).
